body.text: Platform status from the kernel truth sources (lifecycle, findings ring, declaration registry, AI collector).

commands.name: help
commands.summary: Everything the bot can do, generated from its manifests.

body.text: Everything the bot can do, from its own manifests.

commands.name: set
commands.summary: Bind a log slot to a channel.

settings.hint: One combined events channel, or one per category.
settings.name: event_routing

settings.hint: Comma list of channel ids never logged.
settings.name: ignored_channels

settings.hint: Comma list of user ids never logged.
settings.name: ignored_users

settings.hint: Cleanup log channel (falls back to mod).
settings.name: cleanup

commands.name: warn
commands.summary: Warn a member (escalates at the threshold).

body.text: Warn / timeout / kick / ban lanes run through the audited seam; policy below resolves per-guild → global → shipped defaults.

settings.hint: Warnings before the escalation action runs.
settings.name: warn_threshold

settings.hint: Timeout length applied by the warn escalation.
settings.name: warn_timeout_minutes

settings.hint: Comma list of actions that DM the member.
settings.name: dm_actions

settings.hint: Days of messages swept on ban.
settings.name: ban_delete_message_days

settings.hint: Sweep the actioned member's recent messages.
settings.name: post_action_cleanup

settings.hint: Max messages scanned by the post-action sweep.
settings.name: post_action_cleanup_limit

settings.hint: Which actions post to the public log channel.
settings.name: public_log_actions

body.text: Per-subsystem configuration. Every value resolves per-guild explicit → global explicit → default.

commands.name: setup
commands.summary: Guided server setup: presets, channels, roles, moderation, review.

body.text: The setup wizard's sections, ordered by the registry (A-9). Interactive flows arm per-section as they port.
